name: Name Cleanup Python
outcome_goal: All DAG/Dag naming removed from Python source. NativeDagInstance -> NativeWorkflowInstance, NativeDagFrontdoor -> NativeWorkflowFrontdoor, X-DAG headers -> X-Praxis, dag-dispatch -> praxis-dispatch, all docstrings updated.
anti_requirements: Do NOT rename cascade_inactive_to_routes or _mine_failure_cascades — those are legitimate domain terms
Do NOT rename any Postgres trigger or function names
Do NOT modify migration SQL files

jobs.label: rename_native_instance
jobs.outcome_goal: NativeDagInstance no longer exists anywhere in Python source; NativeWorkflowInstance imports correctly
jobs.prompt:
Rename the class `NativeDagInstance` to `NativeWorkflowInstance` in the Praxis Engine codebase.

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/instance.py`:
   - Line 1: change docstring from 'Repo-local native DAG instance resolution' to 'Repo-local native workflow instance resolution'
   - Line 3: change 'native DAG operations' to 'native workflow operations'
   - Line 33: change 'native DAG instance cannot be resolved' to 'native workflow instance cannot be resolved'
   - Line 48: rename class `NativeDagInstance` to `NativeWorkflowInstance`
   - Line 49: change docstring from 'Resolved repo-local native DAG instance contract' to 'Resolved repo-local native workflow instance contract'

2. Update ALL imports of `NativeDagInstance` to `NativeWorkflowInstance` in these files:
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/frontdoor.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/native_operator_surface.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/operator_write.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/_operator_repository.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/native_scheduler.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/_smoke_service.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_frontdoor.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_scheduler_runtime.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_review_repair_fanout_flow.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_default_parallel_proof.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_daily_ops_smoke_loop.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_self_hosted_smoke.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_operator_path_recurring_flow_adoption.py`

Also update any type annotations, variable names, or string literals that reference `NativeDagInstance`.

Do NOT rename `NativeInstanceResolutionError` — that name is fine as-is.
jobs.verify_command: cd /Users/nate/Praxis/Code\&DBs/Workflow && python3 -c 'from runtime.instance import NativeWorkflowInstance; print("OK")' && ! grep -rn 'NativeDagInstance' . --include='*.py' | grep -v __pycache__

jobs.label: rename_native_frontdoor
jobs.outcome_goal: NativeDagFrontdoor no longer exists; NativeWorkflowFrontdoor exports correctly in __all__
jobs.prompt:
Rename the class `NativeDagFrontdoor` to `NativeWorkflowFrontdoor` in the Praxis Engine codebase.

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/frontdoor.py`:
   - Line 610: rename class `NativeDagFrontdoor` to `NativeWorkflowFrontdoor`
   - Line 611: update docstring if it mentions 'DAG'
   - Update the `__all__` export list (around line 902) to use `NativeWorkflowFrontdoor`

2. Update ALL imports of `NativeDagFrontdoor` to `NativeWorkflowFrontdoor` in:
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/_smoke_service.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_frontdoor.py`
   - `Code&DBs/Workflow/tests/integration/test_native_self_hosted_smoke.py`

Also update any type annotations or variable names that reference `NativeDagFrontdoor`.

jobs.label: rename_http_headers
jobs.description: Rename X-DAG-* HTTP headers to X-Praxis-*
jobs.outcome_goal: No X-DAG- headers remain in the codebase
jobs.prompt:
In `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/workflow_mcp.py`:

1. Line 1: change module docstring from 'HTTP bridge for the DAG MCP surface' to 'HTTP bridge for the Praxis Engine MCP surface'
2. Line 23: rename header `X-DAG-Allowed-MCP-Tools` to `X-Praxis-Allowed-MCP-Tools`
3. Line 45: rename header `X-DAG-Workflow-Token` to `X-Praxis-Workflow-Token`

These are the only occurrences. Make sure string literals match exactly.

jobs.label: rename_user_agents
jobs.description: Rename DAG user-agent strings to Praxis
jobs.prompt:
Update user-agent strings in two files:

1. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/github_integration.py`:
   - Line 74: change `dag-workflow-github-integration/1.0` to `praxis-workflow-github-integration/1.0`
   - Line 174: same change if it appears again
   - Also update any other 'DAG' references in comments/docstrings in this file

2. In `Code&DBs/Workflow/adapters/api_task.py`:
   - Line 50: change `DAG-APITaskAdapter/1.0` to `Praxis-APITaskAdapter/1.0`
   - Also update any 'DAG' references in comments/docstrings in this file

jobs.label: rename_integration_registry
jobs.description: Rename dag-dispatch -> praxis-dispatch in integration registry sync
jobs.outcome_goal: No dag-dispatch or provider='dag' in static integrations
jobs.prompt:
In `Code&DBs/Workflow/registry/integration_registry_sync.py`, update the _STATIC_INTEGRATIONS list:

1. Line 21: change `"id": "dag-dispatch"` to `"id": "praxis-dispatch"`
2. Line 22: change `"name": "DAG Dispatch"` to `"name": "Praxis Dispatch"`
3. Line 24: change `"provider": "dag"` to `"provider": "praxis"`
4. Line 28: change description 'Submit a workflow job to the DAG dispatch runtime' to 'Submit a workflow job to the Praxis Engine runtime'
5. Line 48: change `"provider": "dag"` to `"provider": "praxis"` (notifications entry)

Keep the webhook entry unchanged (it has provider: 'http').

jobs.label: rename_docstrings_runtime
jobs.description: Update all DAG docstrings/comments in runtime/ directory
jobs.outcome_goal: No DAG references in runtime/ docstrings except cascade_inactive_to_routes and _mine_failure_cascades
jobs.prompt:
Search all Python files in `Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/` for docstrings and comments containing 'DAG', 'Dag', or 'dag' (case-insensitive). Replace with the appropriate Praxis naming:

- 'native DAG' -> 'native workflow'
- 'DAG operations' -> 'workflow operations'
- 'DAG instance' -> 'workflow instance'
- 'DAG dispatch' -> 'workflow dispatch'
- 'DAG runtime' -> 'Praxis Engine runtime'
- 'DAG execution' -> 'workflow execution'
- 'DAG spec' -> 'workflow spec'
- 'workflow DAG' -> 'workflow graph'
- 'Dag Project' -> 'Praxis'
- 'DAG autonomous engineering' -> 'Praxis autonomous engineering'

IMPORTANT EXCLUSIONS — do NOT rename these:
- `cascade_inactive_to_routes` (legitimate SQL cascade term)
- `_mine_failure_cascades` (legitimate domain term)
- Any reference to 'DAG' meaning directed acyclic graph in a generic computer science context

Key files to check:
- runtime/instance.py (lines 1-8 already covered by rename_native_instance, skip those)
- runtime/health.py (line 1)
- runtime/execution/__init__.py (line 1)
- runtime/execution/dependency.py (line 1)
- runtime/condition_evaluator.py (line 4)
- runtime/task_assembler.py (lines 83, 88 — change 'DAG Workflow' executor name to 'Praxis Workflow')
- Any other files in runtime/ that grep finds

Run: grep -rn 'DAG\|Dag\|dag' Code&DBs/Workflow/runtime/ --include='*.py' | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v cascade_inactive | grep -v _mine_failure | grep -v 'import\|from ' to find all targets.
jobs.verify_command: ! grep -rn 'native DAG\|DAG operations\|DAG instance\|DAG dispatch\|DAG runtime\|DAG execution\|Dag Project\|DAG Workflow' /Users/nate/Praxis/Code\&DBs/Workflow/runtime/ --include='*.py' | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v cascade_inactive | grep -v _mine_failure

Do NOT modify the HTTP headers or class names — those are handled by other jobs.
jobs.verify_command: ! grep -rn 'DAG MCP\|DAG node\|Dag Project\|DAG autonomous\|DAG REST\|native DAG' /Users/nate/Praxis/Code\&DBs/Workflow/adapters/ /Users/nate/Praxis/Code\&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/ --include='*.py' | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v cascade_inactive

jobs.label: rename_cli_help

jobs.prompt:

1. `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/cli/workflow_cli.py`:

jobs.label: verify_python
jobs.description: Final verification sweep for any remaining DAG references in Python
jobs.outcome_goal: Zero remaining DAG/Dag references in Python source (excluding legitimate cascade terms)
jobs.prompt:
Run a comprehensive grep sweep across all Python files in Code&DBs/Workflow/ for any remaining 'DAG', 'Dag', or 'dag' references that should have been renamed.

Run: grep -rn 'NativeDagInstance\|NativeDagFrontdoor\|X-DAG-\|dag-dispatch\|dag-project\|DAG-APITask\|dag-workflow-github\|DAG Dispatch\|DAG Workflow\|Dag Project\|DAG REST\|DAG MCP\|DAG node\|native DAG\|DAG operations\|DAG instance\|DAG dispatch\|DAG runtime\|DAG execution\|DAG autonomous' Code&DBs/Workflow/ --include='*.py' | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -v cascade_inactive | grep -v _mine_failure

If any hits are found, fix them by applying the same naming rules:
- 'DAG' in branding context -> 'Praxis' or 'Praxis Engine'
- 'DAG' in domain context -> 'workflow' or 'workflow graph'
- Class/function names: follow the pattern established by other jobs

Also verify Python imports work: python3 -c 'from runtime.instance import NativeWorkflowInstance; from surfaces.api.frontdoor import NativeWorkflowFrontdoor; print("OK")'
